subject: Updated SDNC version
commit_message:
Updated SDNC version

Update to use version 1.8.1 of SDNC images, which contain
fix for SDNC-1145 (pods still running as root)

Issue-ID: SDNC-1145
Signed-off-by: Dan Timoney <dtimoney@att.com>
Change-Id: Ie596e45958d926e4742b688eec48b887326ddb60

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

This fixes the issue where 2 of the SDNC pods (Dmaap-listener and ueb-listener) were running as root. Note: ueb-listener depends on sdc-be.  I noticed in the gating run, sdc-be didn't come up, so ueb-listener is stuck in a Pending state.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

oom_redeploy

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 2 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

SDNC healthcheck OK
rooted pod OK https://gating-results.onap.eu/results//105847-1/security/root_pods/root_pods.log

onap-sdnc-dmaap-lister pod failing (probably due to aaf-sms job failure)

we can give a new try to be sure
oom_redeploy
